creator: misho@elwix.org
text:
Created attachment 201536
dmesg

When upgraded system from FreeBSD 11.2-RELEASE to FreeBSD 11.2-RELEASE-p8 one of both ix* interfaces reported no carrier and these ports can't be able to bring up anymore!

No matter is how they will be configured. Like ethernet interfaces with addresses or like members in the LAGG interface.

On both servers I have set hw.ix.unsupported_sfp=1 and they are with totally the same configurations.

ix0: <Intel(R) PRO/10GbE PCI-Express Network Driver, Version - 3.2.12-k> port 0x6020-0x603f mem 0xc7d80000-0xc7dfffff,0xc7e04000-0xc7e07fff irq 26 at device 0.0 numa-domain 0 on pci3
